description: You are the EPI (Expanded Programme on Immunization) Manager. You need to analyze the 'dropout' between the first and third doses of the Pentavalent vaccine for 2023 to identify districts with poor retention using the DHIS2 instance at http://localhost:8080 (admin/district). Create a scatter plot visualization for all districts in Sierra Leone for the year 2023, using 'Penta 1 doses given' for the vertical (Y) axis and 'Penta 3 doses given' for the horizontal (X) axis. Save the visualization as 'Penta Dropout Scatter 2023', set the public access sharing setting to 'Can view', and export the data as a CSV file to /home/ga/Downloads/.
